zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai於大約1100年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧易勒-維格時，他的父親Hugues II d'Oisy27歲，母親Hildiarde Mons22歲。他於1130年之前與Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1171年在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德坎布萊享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai于大约1100年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧易勒-維格时，他的父亲Hugues II d'Oisy27岁，母亲Hildiarde Mons22岁。他于1130年之前与Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1171年在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德坎布萊享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'OISY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Aime, Alphonse, Aurore, Fernand, Florent, Gilles, Manon, Michel.
French: from Old French foisil ‘gunflint’, used as a nickname for a maker or seller.
History: Martin Foisy from Bossus-lès-Rumigny in Ardennes married Marie-Madeleine Beaudoin in QC in 1679.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai was born about 1100, in Oisy-le-Verger, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Hugues II d'Oisy, was 27 and his mother, Hildiarde Mons, was 22. He married Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul before 1130, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1171, in Cambrai, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai est né environ 1100, à Oisy-le-Verger, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hugues II d'Oisy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Hildiarde Mons, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul avant 1130, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1171, à Cambrai, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.Montmirail, Sarthe, Pays-de-la-Loire, Fr: Montmirail, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai um 1100 in Oisy-le-Verger, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues II d'Oisy 27 und seine Mutter Hildiarde Mons 22. Er hat vor 1130 in Europa Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1171 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Cambrai, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai è nato il circa 1100 nel Oisy-le-Verger, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues II d'Oisy, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Hildiarde Mons, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul prima del 1130, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1171, nel Cambrai, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambraiが約1100年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスオイシ-レ-バージャーで生まれた時，父Hugues II d'Oisyは27歳，母Hildiarde Monsは22歳であった。1130年以前にヨーロッパでAda de la Ferté-Ancoulと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1171年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードカンブレイで72歳で死去した。

ko.Montmirail, Sarthe, Pays-de-la-Loire, Fr: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 몽미레이
ko.lifeSummary: Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai(이)가 대략 1100년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 이시-레-버거에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues II d'Oisy(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildiarde Mons(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1130년 이전 우럽에서 Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 캄브라이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Oisy-le-Verger, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugues II d'Oisy, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Hildiarde Mons, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul antes 1130, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1171, em Cambrai, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, com 72 anos.

ru.Montmirail, Sarthe, Pays-de-la-Loire, Fr: монтмиреил, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai родился около 1100 г. в местности оиси-ле-виржир, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues II d'Oisy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Hildiarde Mons, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul перед 1130 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1171 г. в местности камбреи, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul antes de 1130, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1171, en Cambrai, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
